title: Automation for sub item status to change when another sub status has changed and dependent on the person who changes it

posts.author: jonnyhomefixerss (Jonny K)
posts.cookedHtml:
This is the automation I would like to create

When sub item status A is changed to done, change sub item status B to a specific status when specific user changes status A

I don’t think this can be done on monday.com but I thought I would ask.

I also tried creating it in Zapier, but I had a lot of trouble with it.

posts.author: kevinfantasymedia (Kevin - Fantasy Media LTD)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @jonnyhomefixerss

You can create a similar custom automation (but not exactly the same) on Monday natively.

image1848×994 53.4 KB

The only difference here is that it doesn’t take into consideration whoever is changing the status – rather it considers who is in the Owner column. So before the person actually changes the status, they have to be assigned in the Owner column first. You can find a way to automate that too, I think.
